name: Sauerkraut Salad with Yogurt Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the sauerkraut; chop coarsely.
2. Wash the grapes and cut in half. Remove seeds if desired.
3. Cut the ham into julienne strips.
4. Gently mix the chopped sauerkraut, grapes, and ham together.
5. Blend the dressing ingredients until smooth.
6. Stir the blended dressing into the salad mixture.
7. Marinate for 10 minutes, then adjust seasoning before serving if necessary.
